mapper.select: SELECT ADMIN_NICKNAME FROM UB_ADMIN WHERE ADMIN_NUMBER = #{adminNumber}
SELECT count(*) FROM UB_MEMBER
SELECT count(*) FROM UB_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_TYPE = 'MENTOR'
SELECT count(*) FROM UB_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_TYPE = 'MENTEE'
SELECT count(*) FROM UB_MATCHING WHERE MATCHING_STATE = '매칭중'
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT umb.board_title, umb.board_date FROM UB_MENTEE_BOARD umb UNION ALL SELECT umb.board_title, umb.board_date FROM UB_MENTOR_BOARD umb ORDER BY board_date desc) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_type, member_date FROM UB_MEMBER ORDER BY member_date desc) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
select count(*) from UB_MENTEE_BOARD
select count(*) from UB_MENTEE_BOARD WHERE board_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{dateFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{dateTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, subquery.* FROM ( SELECT umb.menteeboard_number, board_title, board_click, board_date, CASE WHEN umb.admin_number IS NOT NULL THEN ua.admin_Nickname WHEN umb.MEMBER_number IS NOT NULL THEN um.MEMBER_nickname END AS "write_nickname" FROM UB_MENTEE_BOARD umb LEFT JOIN UB_MEMBER um ON um.MEMBER_NUMBER = umb.MEMBER_NUMBER LEFT JOIN UB_ADMIN UA ON umb.admin_number = ua.admin_number ORDER BY umb.MENTEEBOARD_NUMBER desc ) subquery )WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, subquery.* FROM ( SELECT umb.menteeboard_number, board_title, board_click, board_date, CASE WHEN umb.admin_number IS NOT NULL THEN ua.admin_Nickname WHEN umb.MEMBER_number IS NOT NULL THEN um.MEMBER_nickname END AS "write_nickname" FROM UB_MENTEE_BOARD umb LEFT JOIN UB_MEMBER um ON um.MEMBER_NUMBER = umb.MEMBER_NUMBER LEFT JOIN UB_ADMIN UA ON umb.admin_number = ua.admin_number WHERE board_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{dateFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{dateTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY umb.MENTEEBOARD_NUMBER desc ) subquery )WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT UMB.menteeboard_number, UMB.BOARD_TITLE , UMB.BOARD_CONTENT , UMB.BOARD_CONTENT , UMB.BOARD_CLICK , UMB.board_date, UF.FILE_NAME, CASE WHEN umb.admin_number IS NOT NULL THEN ua.admin_Nickname WHEN umb.MEMBER_number IS NOT NULL THEN um.MEMBER_nickname END AS "write_nickname", CASE WHEN umb.admin_number IS NOT NULL THEN ua.admin_number WHEN umb.MEMBER_number IS NOT NULL THEN um.MEMBER_number END AS "write_number" FROM UB_MENTEE_BOARD UMB LEFT JOIN UB_MEMBER UM ON UMB.member_number = UM.member_number LEFT JOIN UB_ADMIN UA ON UMB.admin_number = UA.admin_number LEFT JOIN UB_FILE UF ON UMB.FILE_NUMBER = UF.FILE_NUMBER WHERE UMB.MENTEEBOARD_NUMBER = #{boardNumber}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_MENTEE_BOARD.nextVal FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO UB_mentee_board(menteeboard_number, board_title, board_content, admin_number) VALUES(#{menteeboardNumber}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{writeNumber})
mapper.select: SELECT MENTEE_COM_ID as menteeComNumber, MENTEE_COM_CONTENT as menteeComContent, MENTEE_COM_DATE as menteeComDate, UM.MEMBER_NICKNAME as memberNickname FROM UB_MENTEE_BOARD_COMMENT MBC JOIN UB_MEMBER UM ON MBC.MEMBER_NUMBER = UM.MEMBER_NUMBER WHERE MENTEEBOARD_ID = #{boardNumber} ORDER BY MENTEE_COM_DATE DESC
select count(*) from UB_MENTOR_BOARD
select count(*) from UB_MENTOR_BOARD WHERE board_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{dateFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{dateTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, subquery.* FROM ( SELECT umb.mentorboard_number, board_title, board_click, board_date, CASE WHEN umb.admin_number IS NOT NULL THEN ua.admin_Nickname WHEN umb.MEMBER_number IS NOT NULL THEN um.MEMBER_nickname END AS "write_nickname" FROM UB_MENTOR_BOARD umb LEFT JOIN UB_MEMBER um ON um.MEMBER_NUMBER = umb.MEMBER_NUMBER LEFT JOIN UB_ADMIN UA ON umb.admin_number = ua.admin_number ORDER BY umb.MENTORBOARD_NUMBER desc ) subquery )WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, subquery.* FROM ( SELECT umb.mentorboard_number, board_title, board_click, board_date, CASE WHEN umb.admin_number IS NOT NULL THEN ua.admin_Nickname WHEN umb.MEMBER_number IS NOT NULL THEN um.MEMBER_nickname END AS "write_nickname" FROM UB_MENTOR_BOARD umb LEFT JOIN UB_MEMBER um ON um.MEMBER_NUMBER = umb.MEMBER_NUMBER LEFT JOIN UB_ADMIN UA ON umb.admin_number = ua.admin_number WHERE board_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{dateFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{dateTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY umb.MENTORBOARD_NUMBER desc ) subquery )WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT UMB.mentorboard_number, UMB.BOARD_TITLE , UMB.BOARD_CONTENT , UMB.BOARD_CONTENT , UMB.BOARD_CLICK , UMB.board_date, UF.FILE_NAME, CASE WHEN umb.admin_number IS NOT NULL THEN ua.admin_Nickname WHEN umb.MEMBER_number IS NOT NULL THEN um.MEMBER_nickname END AS "write_nickname", CASE WHEN umb.admin_number IS NOT NULL THEN ua.admin_number WHEN umb.MEMBER_number IS NOT NULL THEN um.MEMBER_number END AS "write_number" FROM UB_MENTOR_BOARD UMB LEFT JOIN UB_MEMBER UM ON UMB.member_number = UM.member_number LEFT JOIN UB_ADMIN UA ON UMB.admin_number = UA.admin_number LEFT JOIN UB_FILE UF ON UMB.FILE_NUMBER = UF.FILE_NUMBER WHERE UMB.MENTORBOARD_NUMBER = #{boardNumber}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_MENTOR_BOARD.nextVal FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO UB_mentor_board(mentorboard_number, board_title, board_content, admin_number) VALUES(#{mentorboardNumber}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{writeNumber})
mapper.select: SELECT MENTOR_COM_ID as mentorComNumber, MENTOR_COM_CONTENT as mentorComContent, MENTOR_COM_DATE as mentorComDate, UM.MEMBER_NICKNAME as memberNickname FROM UB_MENTOR_BOARD_COMMENT MBC JOIN UB_MEMBER UM ON MBC.MEMBER_NUMBER = UM.MEMBER_NUMBER WHERE MENTORBOARD_ID = #{boardNumber} ORDER BY MENTOR_COM_DATE DESC
select count(*) from UB_NOTICEBOARD
select count(*) from UB_NOTICEBOARD WHERE board_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{dateFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{dateTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
select count(*) from UB_NOTICEBOARD WHERE BOARD_TYPE = #{boardType}

SELECT m.admin_number, m.admin_Nickname, b.NOTICEBOARD_NUMBER, b.board_title, b.board_content, b.board_date, b.BOARD_CLICK, b.FILE_NUMBER FROM UB_admin m JOIN UB_NOTICEBOARD b ON b.admin_number = m.admin_number WHERE b.NOTICEBOARD_NUMBER = #{boardNumber}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_NOTICEBOARD.nextVal FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO UB_noticeboard(noticeboard_number, board_title, board_content, admin_number, board_type, board_date, file_number) VALUES(#{noticeboardNumber}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{adminNumber}, #{boardType} , sysdate, #{fileNumber})
